title: Connect Client
description: connect with people, even if the other person uses vanilla
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94c8d6e5e9b459c883bfa45edba0f548ae1df0bc.png)
Connect Client is the modpack for players who want to enhance the vanilla experience while keeping the entire gameplay intact. This pack introduces numerous performance optimizations, and visual upgrades, making every aspect of the game feel smoother, more immersive, and more enjoyable.

Key Enhancements:
- Optimized Performance – Enjoy significantly improved FPS, refined chunk loading, and better overall game stability, allowing for seamless exploration.
- Stunning Visuals – The integration of shaders transforms MC landscapes with dynamic lighting, realistic shadows, and breathtaking reflections, all while maintaining a balance between beauty and efficiency.
- Multiplayer-Friendly – Designed to be lightweight and compatible with all servers, and the inclusion of the essentials mod making the experience of playing with a friend easier.
